item.title: Admissions
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
Contents

  1. Overview
  2. UK Admissions
  3. Overseas Admissions
  4. Visit Us
  5. Fees
  6. Scholarships
  7. Bursaries
  8. Apply
  9. Term Dates

Joining Kentwood Academy is the beginning of an exciting academic and personal journey. Our admissions process is designed to introduce families to our community, as well as assess the fit for prospective students.

Overview

Kentwood Academy welcomes students from diverse backgrounds and experiences. Our holistic admission process ensures that we select students who will thrive in our nurturing environment. Learn More

UK Admissions

For families based in the UK, our admission process is straightforward. From application to interview, we guide you every step of the way, ensuring a seamless transition for your child. UK Admissions Process

Overseas Admissions

We proudly host students from all over the world. Our overseas admissions team is dedicated to assisting international families in navigating the application and settling process. International Admissions Details

Visit Us

We believe the best way to understand Kentwood is to experience it. Schedule a visit to explore our campus, interact with our community, and witness our ethos in action. Book Your Visit

Fees

Investing in quality education is invaluable. Our fee structure is transparent and provides options for various needs. Detailed Fee Structure

Scholarships

Recognizing and nurturing talent is vital. Kentwood offers a range of scholarships for students excelling in academics, arts, sports, and other areas. Scholarship Opportunities

Bursaries

We are committed to making Kentwood accessible. Our bursary program assists families in need, ensuring deserving students benefit from our exceptional education. Bursary Information

Apply

Ready to embark on the Kentwood journey? Begin your application process here and take the first step towards joining our vibrant community. Start Your Application

Term Dates

Stay updated with our academic calendar to be informed about important events, holidays, and term schedules. View Academic Calendar

Kentwood Academy's admissions team is here to guide and support you. We look forward to welcoming your family to our community!

item.title: About
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
Contents

  1. Kentwood People
  2. Aims and Vision
  3. History
  4. Our Location
  5. Governance and Staff
  6. Our Future Plans

Kentwood Academy stands as a beacon of educational excellence, nurturing generations of students and instilling in them the values, knowledge, and skills required to shape a better future.

Kentwood People

Our institution thrives because of the incredible individuals who call Kentwood home. From our devoted staff and faculty to our passionate students and alumni, we're a community united by our love for learning.

  • Meet our Leadership Team
  • Stories from our Alumni
  • Spotlight on Faculty & Staff

Aims and Vision

At Kentwood, we aim to foster an environment that encourages both academic mastery and personal growth. Our vision is to develop holistic individuals, ready to face the challenges of the world with resilience, empathy, and intelligence.

  • Read our Mission Statement
  • Explore our Core Values

History

Kentwood Academy has a storied past, deeply rooted in traditions while always looking forward to innovation. Discover our journey from a humble countryside school to a renowned institution of learning.

  • Kentwood Through the Ages
  • Milestones & Achievements

Our Location

Nestled in the picturesque countryside of the UK, our campus offers a serene and conducive environment for learning, away from the bustle of city life.

  • Explore our Campus
  • Getting to Kentwood

Governance and Staff

Our school's success can be attributed to the dedicated governance team and our incredible staff that ensure the seamless running of our academic and extracurricular programs.

  • Meet our Board of Governors
  • Staff Directory

Our Future Plans

At Kentwood, we're always looking ahead. Learn about our ambitious plans for the future, from infrastructural expansions to new academic programs.

  • Upcoming Projects & Initiatives
  • Join our Journey

Kentwood Academy's legacy is a testament to the continuous effort, dedication, and love poured into it by every individual associated with our institution. As we continue on this educational journey, we invite you to become a part of our rich tapestry of history, achievements, and aspirations.

item.title: Academic
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
Contents

  1. Curriculum
  2. Departments and Subjects
  3. Examination Results
  4. Higher Education and Careers
  5. Online Learning
  6. University Destinations

The academic journey at Kentwood Academy is designed to inspire intellectual curiosity, instill a love for learning, and equip students with the skills necessary to thrive in higher education and beyond.

Curriculum

Our curriculum is comprehensive and forward-thinking, ensuring students are well-prepared for the challenges of the modern world. We believe in blending traditional subjects with innovative learning methodologies to achieve holistic education. Explore Our Curriculum

Departments and Subjects

Each academic department at Kentwood boasts seasoned educators passionate about their subjects. From the Sciences to the Humanities, every discipline is taught with enthusiasm and depth. Meet Our Departments

Examination Results

Kentwood takes pride in its consistent record of outstanding examination results. Our students' achievements are a testament to their hard work and the dedication of our teaching staff. View Our Recent Results

Higher Education and Careers

Beyond the classroom, we offer robust guidance for students contemplating their higher education and career choices, ensuring they make informed decisions for their futures. Learn About Our Guidance Program

Online Learning

In today's digital age, Kentwood is at the forefront of integrating technology into the learning experience. Our online learning platforms supplement traditional teaching, making education accessible anytime, anywhere. Explore Our Digital Platforms

University Destinations

Our graduates consistently secure places in top universities worldwide. Their achievements are a reflection of Kentwood's commitment to excellence in education. See Where Our Graduates Go

Kentwood Academy's academic ethos focuses on providing an environment that fosters not only academic excellence but also personal growth, ensuring our students are well-rounded, informed, and ready to take on the world.

item.title: Term Dates
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
Contents

  1. Autumn Term 2023
  2. Spring Term 2024
  3. Summer Term 2024
  4. Whole School Events - 2023/2024 Academic Year

Autumn Term 2023

Start of Term:

  • Staff Inset Day: Monday, 4th September 2023
  • Students Return: Tuesday, 5th September 2023

Mid-Term Break:

  • Start: Monday, 23rd October 2023
  • End: Friday, 27th October 2023

End of Term:

  • Last Day for Students: Friday, 15th December 2023
  • Staff Development Day: Monday, 18th December 2023

Notable Events & Special Days:

  • Harvest Festival Celebration: Friday, 22nd September 2023
  • Parents' Evening for Year 7: Thursday, 5th October 2023
  • Kentwood Academy's Annual Autumn Fair: Saturday, 11th November 2023
  • Remembrance Day Assembly: Saturday, 11th November 2023
  • School Open Day: Wednesday, 22nd November 2023
  • Christmas Carol Service: Thursday, 14th December 2023

Spring Term 2024

Start of Term:

  • Staff Inset Day: Monday, 8th January 2024
  • Students Return: Tuesday, 9th January 2024

Mid-Term Break:

  • Start: Monday, 19th February 2024
  • End: Friday, 23rd February 2024

End of Term:

  • Last Day for Students: Thursday, 29th March 2024
  • Staff Development Day: Friday, 30th March 2024

Notable Events & Special Days:

  • Kentwood Science Fair: Wednesday, 31st January 2024
  • Year 9 Options Evening: Tuesday, 6th February 2024
  • St. Valentine's Charity Dance: Wednesday, 14th February 2024
  • World Book Day Celebrations: Thursday, 7th March 2024
  • Spring Music Concert: Tuesday, 20th March 2024
  • Parents' Evening for Year 11: Thursday, 22nd March 2024

Summer Term 2024

Start of Term:

  • Staff Inset Day: Monday, 16th April 2024
  • Students Return: Tuesday, 17th April 2024

May Half-Term Break:

  • Start: Monday, 27th May 2024
  • End: Friday, 31st May 2024

End of Term:

  • Last Day for Students: Friday, 5th July 2024
  • Staff Development Day: Monday, 8th July 2024

Notable Events & Special Days:

  • Kentwood Arts Festival: Wednesday, 1st May 2024
  • Sports Day: Friday, 10th May 2024
  • Year 8 Adventure Trip: Wednesday, 22nd May 2024 - Friday, 24th May 2024
  • Summer Ball: Saturday, 15th June 2024
  • Kentwood Graduation & Awards Ceremony: Friday, 28th June 2024
  • Parents' Evening for Year 10: Tuesday, 2nd July 2024

Whole School Events - 2023/2024 Academic Year

Autumn Term 2023:

  • Kentwood Welcoming Ceremony: Wednesday, 6th September 2023
    • A special day to welcome new and returning students, setting the tone for the academic year ahead.
  • Harvest Festival Celebration: Friday, 22nd September 2023
    • Celebrating the season's bounty with performances, displays, and charitable giving.
  • Annual Autumn Fair: Saturday, 11th November 2023
    • An event for students, families, and the local community to come together, featuring stalls, games, and performances.
  • Christmas Carol Service: Thursday, 14th December 2023
    • A festive evening of song, reflection, and community spirit.

Spring Term 2024:

  • Kentwood Science Fair: Wednesday, 31st January 2024
    • Showcasing the innovative projects and experiments by our budding scientists.
  • St. Valentine's Charity Dance: Wednesday, 14th February 2024
    • A delightful evening of dance, with proceeds going to a charitable cause.
  • World Book Day Celebrations: Thursday, 7th March 2024
    • A day celebrating literature, with themed activities, readings, and costume parades.

Summer Term 2024:

  • Kentwood Arts Festival: Wednesday, 1st May 2024
    • An event spotlighting our students' artistic talents in various mediums.
  • Sports Day: Friday, 10th May 2024
    • A day of friendly athletic competitions, promoting teamwork and physical fitness.
  • Summer Ball: Saturday, 15th June 2024
    • A glamorous evening for our older students to celebrate the year's achievements.
  • Kentwood Graduation & Awards Ceremony: Friday, 28th June 2024
    • Honoring the achievements of our departing students and celebrating their time at Kentwood.

item.title: Boarding
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
Contents

  1. A Home Away from Home
  2. International Community
  3. Dedicated Staff and Support
  4. Academic Focus
  5. Well-being and Health
  6. Activities and Recreation
  7. Culinary Delights
  8. Safety First
  9. Preparing for Independence

Kentwood Academy's boarding community is a tapestry of diverse cultures, ideas, and experiences. Nestled in the picturesque UK countryside, our boarding houses offer a home away from home, providing students with a nurturing environment that encourages both academic achievement and personal growth.

A Home Away from Home

Stepping into one of Kentwood's boarding houses feels like entering a large family home. From the cozy dorm rooms to the communal lounges, every space is designed to ensure students feel comfortable and secure.

International Community

Boarding at Kentwood means being part of a global family. With students from all corners of the world, there's an enriching blend of cultures and traditions, leading to lifelong friendships and a deeper understanding of the world.

Dedicated Staff and Support

Our house parents and boarding staff are more than just caretakers; they're mentors, guides, and confidants. They ensure each boarder feels supported, understood, and cherished.

Academic Focus

While the boarding environment is relaxed, there's a pronounced emphasis on academics. Study sessions, tutoring, and academic workshops are integral, ensuring boarders excel in their studies.

Well-being and Health

Kentwood ensures the physical and mental well-being of its boarders. With a fully equipped health center on campus, medical care is always at hand. Additionally, counseling services and well-being programs help students navigate the challenges of adolescence.

Activities and Recreation

Life at Kentwood's boarding isn't all work and no play. From movie nights to weekend outings, there's always something happening. The academy encourages boarders to engage in various sports, arts, and cultural activities, ensuring a well-rounded boarding experience.

Culinary Delights

Our in-house chefs prepare nutritious and delicious meals, keeping in mind the diverse palates of our students. Special dietary requirements are catered to, ensuring every student feels at home.

Safety First

Security is paramount. With round-the-clock security, surveillance, and strict protocols in place, parents can rest assured knowing their children are in safe hands.

Preparing for Independence

Boarding at Kentwood is more than just a comfortable stay; it's about preparing students for university life and beyond. Through responsibilities, communal living, and independence, boarders develop life skills that stand them in good stead for the future.

Kentwood Academy's boarding experience is a harmonious blend of rigorous academics, personal growth, and memorable experiences. As our boarders embark on this transformative journey, we take pride in seeing them evolve into confident, compassionate, and global-minded individuals.

item.title: School Life
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
Contents

  1. Daily Routine
  2. House System
  3. Dining
  4. Clubs and Societies
  5. Pastoral Care
  6. Weekend Activities
  7. Celebrating Traditions
  8. Student Leadership

Immersed in the idyllic countryside, Kentwood Academy offers more than just a traditional academic experience. School life here is a blend of holistic education, rich traditions, and numerous opportunities designed to nurture well-rounded individuals. Dive deep into the vibrant, multifaceted life that Kentwood has to offer.

Daily Routine

A day at Kentwood is a blend of academic pursuits, extra-curricular activities, and moments of reflection. From the morning assembly that sets a positive tone, to engaging classes, club activities, and evening recreation - every moment is structured to enhance learning and personal growth.

House System

Every student at Kentwood is allocated to one of our historic houses. These houses, more than just living quarters, are the hub of competitions, camaraderie, and spirit. Inter-house competitions, ranging from sports to arts, foster a healthy spirit of competition and community.

Dining

We take pride in offering nutritious, delicious meals prepared fresh in our school kitchens. The communal dining experience is not just about food but also about fostering conversations, sharing, and gratitude. Special dietary needs are catered to, ensuring every student feels at home.

Clubs and Societies

Beyond the classroom, Kentwood boasts a plethora of clubs and societies. Whether you're an aspiring artist, a budding scientist, or someone with a passion for drama, there's a club that caters to every interest. Our clubs are student-driven, fostering leadership and teamwork.

Pastoral Care

The wellbeing of our students is paramount. Our pastoral care system ensures that every student has a mentor and guide, helping them navigate school life and any challenges that arise. Regular check-ins, wellbeing workshops, and an open-door policy ensure students always have someone to turn to.

Weekend Activities

For boarders and day students alike, weekends at Kentwood are a mix of relaxation, adventure, and learning. From hikes in the neighboring countryside, to workshops, movie nights, and town visits - weekends are eagerly anticipated.

Celebrating Traditions

Kentwood is steeped in traditions. Annual events, festivals, and special days form the backbone of the school calendar. They provide an opportunity to come together, celebrate, and appreciate the rich legacy that the academy carries.

Student Leadership

Empowering students to be future leaders is integral to Kentwood's philosophy. Our student council, house captains, and other leadership roles provide students with opportunities to lead, take responsibility, and make a positive impact.

Embarking on your journey at Kentwood means embracing a life full of opportunities, learning, and growth. Every day brings new challenges, experiences, and joys, ensuring our students leave as confident, compassionate, and curious individuals, ready to make their mark on the world. Discover More

item.title: Parent Portal
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
Contents

  1. Absence from School
  2. Calendar & Dates
  3. Public Exam Information
  4. School Shop
  5. School Travel Services
  6. Fees

Absence from School

Reporting an Absence:

  1. Immediate Notification: Please notify the school before 9:00 am on the day of your child's absence. This ensures the safety and well-being of our students.
  2. Mode of Reporting: Use the 'Report Absence' feature on this portal or call our dedicated absence hotline at [School's Phone Number].
  3. Details Needed: When reporting, please provide your child's full name, class, reason for absence, and the expected duration of absence.

Authorized Absences Include:

  • Illness (please provide a doctor's note for absences longer than three days)
  • Medical/Dental appointments
  • Bereavement
  • Religious observances

Unplanned Absences: If an unplanned absence occurs due to unforeseen circumstances, please inform the school as soon as possible.

Planned Absences: For planned absences, such as family holidays during term time, you must seek permission in advance. Please use the 'Request for Leave' form available on this portal. Note: It's essential to understand that granting leave during term time is at the school's discretion and generally discouraged.

Prolonged Absence: If your child will be absent for an extended period due to medical or other serious reasons, please contact their class teacher or the school's pastoral team to discuss support and ensure a smooth transition upon their return.

Absence Records: All absences, both authorized and unexplained, are recorded. Regular checks are made, and parents might be contacted if a pattern of non-attendance or frequent absences emerge.

Support: Should there be any issues or concerns regarding attendance, we encourage parents to reach out. Our pastoral team is here to help and can provide support, advice, and intervention if needed.

Remember, consistent attendance is a critical factor in academic success. Let's work together to ensure your child's educational journey at Kentwood Academy is uninterrupted and fulfilling.

Calendar & Dates

Staying informed about important school dates is essential for planning and ensuring your child participates in all of Kentwood Academy's enriching activities. Here, we've provided an easy-to-navigate calendar filled with significant dates for the academic year.

Term Dates:

  • Autumn Term 2023:
    • Start: Monday, 4th September 2023
    • Half-Term: Monday, 23rd October - Friday, 27th October 2023
    • End: Friday, 15th December 2023
  • Spring Term 2024:
    • Start: Monday, 8th January 2024
    • Half-Term: Monday, 19th February - Friday, 23rd February 2024
    • End: Friday, 29th March 2024
  • Summer Term 2024:
    • Start: Monday, 22nd April 2024
    • Half-Term: Monday, 27th May - Friday, 31st May 2024
    • End: Friday, 5th July 2024

Key Events:

  • Autumn Fair: Saturday, 11th November 2023
  • Christmas Carol Service: Thursday, 14th December 2023
  • Spring Science Fair: Wednesday, 31st January 2024
  • Sports Day: Friday, 10th May 2024
  • Kentwood Graduation & Awards Ceremony: Friday, 28th June 2024

Features:

  • Interactive Calendar: Use our online calendar tool to view, add to your personal calendar, and set reminders for upcoming events.
  • Downloadable PDF: Prefer a physical copy? Download a printable version of the calendar for easy reference.
  • Event Details: Click on an event for more details, including venue, time, and any necessary preparations.

Note: Dates might be subject to change due to unforeseen circumstances. We advise frequently checking the calendar and watching for email updates for any alterations or additions.

Public Exam Information

The culmination of our students' hard work and dedication, public exams are a pivotal part of the educational journey at Kentwood Academy. This section provides crucial details, guidelines, and resources to ensure both parents and students are well-prepared.

Key Exam Dates for 2024:

  • GCSE Examinations: Monday, 6th May - Friday, 14th June 2024
  • A-Level Examinations: Monday, 20th May - Tuesday, 18th June 2024
  • IGCSE Examinations: Wednesday, 1st May - Thursday, 13th June 2024

Preparation Materials:

  • Revision Guides: Comprehensive guides tailored to each subject, filled with essential content, practice questions, and exam tips.
  • Timetables: Detailed schedules for each exam, ensuring students know when and where they need to be.
  • Past Papers: Archived exam papers from previous years to aid in practice and familiarity.

Exam Day Guidelines:

  1. Arrival: Students should arrive at least 15 minutes before the scheduled exam start time.
  2. Uniform: Full school uniform must be worn during all examinations.
  3. Materials: Ensure your child has necessary stationery, including black pens, pencils, a calculator (where permitted), and a clear pencil case.
  4. Electronic Devices: Mobile phones, smartwatches, and other electronic devices are strictly prohibited in the exam hall. Please ensure they are left at home or handed over to the invigilator.
  5. Conduct: Silence must be maintained in the exam hall. Students should follow all instructions from the invigilator.

Results Day:

  • GCSE Results: Thursday, 22nd August 2024
  • A-Level Results: Thursday, 15th August 2024
  • IGCSE Results: Wednesday, 21st August 2024

Post-Exam Support: If your child needs any support or advice post-results, our dedicated staff will be available to discuss potential paths, retakes, or further education options.

Queries & Concerns: For any exam-related concerns, please contact our Examination Officer, Mrs Rebecca Smith or via the school's contact number.

Note: The above dates and guidelines are based on the general procedures of UK examinations. They might be subject to change based on the specific examination boards Kentwood Academy is affiliated with. We advise keeping a regular check on this portal for any updates.

School Shop

Welcome to the Kentwood Academy School Shop – your one-stop destination for all official school merchandise, uniforms, stationery, and more. We're dedicated to providing high-quality items that meet the specific needs and standards of our school community.

Featured Items:

  • Uniforms: From blazers and ties to PE kits, find the complete range of Kentwood Academy attire that reflects our school's proud tradition and identity.
  • Stationery: Stock up on essential academic supplies, including branded notebooks, pens, pencils, and more.
  • Sports Equipment: Whether it's a rugby ball or a hockey stick, find all the gear your child needs for their sporting endeavours at Kentwood.
  • Kentwood Merchandise: Show your school spirit with our range of branded merchandise including mugs, keychains, and more.
  • Textbooks & Guides: Get the recommended textbooks and study materials for all year groups.

Shopping Features:

  • Online Ordering: Browse and purchase items from the comfort of your home, with convenient home delivery or in-school pickup options.
  • Size Guides: Unsure about sizes? Our comprehensive guide will help ensure your child gets the perfect fit.
  • Special Offers: Keep an eye out for seasonal discounts and bundle deals.
  • Returns & Exchanges: Hassle-free return and exchange policies if you're not entirely satisfied with your purchase.

Store Hours:

  • Monday to Friday: 9:00 AM - 4:30 PM
  • Saturday: 10:00 AM - 2:00 PM (First Saturday of every month)

Location: The school shop is conveniently located near the main entrance of Kentwood Academy, ensuring easy access for parents and students.

Contact: For queries related to products, orders, or any other concerns, please contact our Shop Manager, Mr. Jonathan Hughes or via the school's main contact number.

Note: Our inventory is regularly updated based on availability and demand. We recommend checking the online portal for the most recent stock information and any special promotions.

School Travel Services

At Kentwood Academy, we understand the importance of safe and reliable transportation for our students. To facilitate smooth commuting, we offer an array of travel services that cater to the diverse needs of our school community.

School Bus Routes:

We run several school bus routes that cover major residential areas surrounding Kentwood. The routes are designed to ensure timely pick-up and drop-off for our students.

  • Route A: [Example Area 1] - [Example Area 2] - Kentwood Academy
  • Route B: [Example Area 3] - [Example Area 4] - Kentwood Academy
  • ... [Additional Routes]

Features:

  • GPS Tracking: All our buses are equipped with GPS devices, allowing parents to track the vehicle in real-time through our dedicated app.
  • Safety First: Our buses have professional drivers, supported by an onboard assistant to ensure students' safety and well-being.
  • Flexible Options: Choose between one-way or round-trip services based on your child's needs.

Car Pooling:

For parents looking for an eco-friendly and community-driven alternative, our carpooling initiative is a great choice. Connect with other Kentwood families in your vicinity and share the school run.

Cycle to School:

Kentwood Academy is set amidst the picturesque countryside, making cycling a viable and healthy travel option. We provide secure bike storage facilities for students choosing to cycle.

Public Transportation:

Our school is also accessible through various public transport links, with the nearest bus and train stations only a short walk away.

Travel Passes & Fees:

Information on travel passes, fees, and payment options is available through the school office or by logging into your Parent Portal account.

Contact:

For route-specific queries, service feedback, or any other transportation-related concerns, please contact our Travel Coordinator, Ms. Elaine Morris.

Note: We encourage parents to book travel services well in advance, especially at the start of the academic year, to secure their preferred options.

At Kentwood Academy, education isn't just about academic achievement. It's a holistic journey that nurtures both the mind and the spirit. Nestled amidst verdant greenery, our sprawling campus is a haven of knowledge, buzzing with the vibrant energy of curious minds. Classrooms echo with spirited discussions, hallways reverberate with laughter, and every corner of the school is imbued with a sense of purpose and passion.

Our esteemed faculty is the backbone of Kentwood. With a rich tapestry of experiences and qualifications, they don't just teach; they inspire. Every lesson is a blend of traditional wisdom and contemporary insights, ensuring that our students are always at the forefront of innovation and excellence. Beyond the textbooks, our educators focus on life skills, from critical thinking to emotional intelligence, preparing our young scholars for the challenges of the ever-evolving world.

Fees

Nestled amidst verdant greenery, our sprawling campus is a haven of knowledge, buzzing with the vibrant energy of curious minds. Classrooms echo with spirited discussions, hallways reverberate with laughter, and every corner of the school is imbued with a sense of purpose and passion.

Our esteemed faculty is the backbone of Kentwood. With a rich tapestry of experiences and qualifications, they don't just teach; they inspire. Every lesson is a blend of traditional wisdom and contemporary insights, ensuring that our students are always at the forefront of innovation and excellence. Beyond the textbooks, our educators focus on life skills, from critical thinking to emotional intelligence, preparing our young scholars for the challenges of the ever-evolving world.

item.title: Fees
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
Contents

  1. 2023-2024 Per Term
  2. Day
  3. Flexi Boarding
  4. Weekly Boarding
  5. Full Boarding
  6. One Year GCSE and Pre-A Level Programmes

Investing in your child's future at Kentwood Academy is a commitment to excellence in education. Our fee structure is transparent and competitive, reflecting the quality of facilities, faculty, and holistic educational experience we provide.

2023-2024 Per Term

Stay updated with our term-by-term fee breakdown for the academic year 2023-2024. This comprehensive list ensures clarity for our parents and guardians. View Term Fee Breakdown

Day

For students attending Kentwood on a daily basis, our fees encompass the full range of educational activities and day-to-day experiences. View Day Fees

Flexi Boarding

Our Flexi Boarding option provides families with the flexibility they need. Whether it's a few nights a week or just occasional stays, find out the associated costs here. View Flexi Boarding Fees

Weekly Boarding

Students who board throughout the week can explore the associated costs here. This fee includes lodging, meals, and special weekend activities. View Weekly Boarding Fees

Full Boarding

For students who stay with us throughout the term, the full boarding fee covers all aspects of life at Kentwood, from academic to extracurricular. View Full Boarding Fees

One Year GCSE and Pre-A Level Programmes

For students on accelerated or specialized programs, the fees for our one-year GCSE and Pre-A Level courses can be found here. View Programme Fees

At Kentwood Academy, we understand that financing an education is a significant commitment. We are here to provide clarity and support as you navigate this process. Our goal is to ensure every student benefits from the unparalleled opportunities we offer.

item.title: Enquire
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
Contents

  1. General Enquiries
  2. Admissions Enquiries
  3. Boarding Enquiries
  4. Fees and Financial Enquiries
  5. Events and Visits

At Kentwood Academy, we value the relationship we share with our prospective families. We're here to assist and provide you with all the information you need. If you have any questions or require further insights about life at Kentwood, do not hesitate to reach out.

General Enquiries

For questions about the daily life, academic programs, or any general topics, connect with our Admissions Office. Contact General Enquiries

Admissions Enquiries

If you're considering joining the Kentwood family or are in the middle of your application process and need guidance, our Admissions Team is eager to help. Contact Admissions

Boarding Enquiries

Discover more about our boarding facilities, daily routines, and the vibrant community life our boarders enjoy. Our boarding team is on hand to answer all your questions. Contact Boarding

Fees and Financial Enquiries

For detailed information about our fee structure, scholarships, bursaries, or other financial-related queries, reach out to our Finance Department. Contact Finance

Events and Visits

Interested in attending an open day or arranging a personal visit? Get in touch to discover upcoming events or schedule a bespoke tour. Contact Events Coordinator

We're passionate about showcasing the Kentwood experience to prospective families. We're only a click or call away, ready to offer insights, answer questions, and welcome you to our community.

item.title: Visit
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
Contents

  1. Personal Tours
  2. Open Days
  3. Group Visits
  4. Preparing for Your Visit

Discover the vibrant world of Kentwood Academy firsthand. We warmly welcome prospective families and students to experience our nurturing environment, state-of-the-art facilities, and our beautiful countryside setting.

Personal Tours

Every family's journey at Kentwood is unique. Arrange a tailored tour that caters to your interests, be it academic programs, extra-curricular opportunities, or boarding facilities. Dive deep into the Kentwood experience, guided by our knowledgeable staff. Arrange a Personal Tour

Open Days

Throughout the year, we host open days where families can explore our expansive campus, interact with our faculty and current students, and partake in various interactive sessions. These events provide a comprehensive overview of life at Kentwood. Register for an Open Day

Group Visits

Schools and educational institutions interested in learning about our teaching methodologies and facilities can organize group visits. Experience our community spirit and discover our approach to holistic education. Organize a Group Visit

Preparing for Your Visit

Visiting a new place can be filled with questions. We've compiled a list of frequently asked questions, travel directions, and other essentials to ensure your visit to Kentwood is smooth and enjoyable. Visit Preparation Guide

Choosing the right educational institution is a significant decision. We believe that experiencing Kentwood firsthand can help make that decision clearer. Whether in person or virtually, we're excited to welcome you to our school and showcase what makes Kentwood Academy special.

item.title: Apply
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
Contents

  1. Step 1: Research and Discover
  2. Step 2: Visit Us
  3. Step 3: Application Submission
  4. Step 4: Assessment and Interview
  5. Step 5: Offer and Acceptance
  6. Step 6: Onboarding

Joining the Kentwood Academy family is a journey filled with excitement and discovery. We've streamlined our application process to ensure a smooth experience for prospective students and their families. Here's a step-by-step guide to begin your Kentwood adventure.

Step 1: Research and Discover

Delve deep into the world of Kentwood Academy. Familiarize yourself with our curriculum, values, extra-curricular activities, and community ethos. Our website and brochures offer a wealth of information to get you started. Explore Kentwood

Step 2: Visit Us

Experiencing Kentwood firsthand provides invaluable insights. Attend an open day, book a personal tour, or take a virtual journey through our facilities. Engaging directly helps in understanding if Kentwood aligns with your aspirations. Arrange a Visit

Step 3: Application Submission

Once you've made the decision, fill in our online application form. Ensure you have all the necessary documents, which typically include previous school reports, recommendation letters, and any additional information relevant to the student's academic journey. Start Your Application

Step 4: Assessment and Interview

Post submission, selected candidates will be invited for an assessment and interview. This is an opportunity for us to understand the student's academic potential, interests, and how they'd fit into the Kentwood community. It's also an occasion for the student to ask questions and get to know our faculty.

Step 5: Offer and Acceptance

Successful candidates will receive an offer letter detailing the next steps. Once you decide to accept the offer, a formal acceptance form along with the required deposit needs to be submitted to secure the place. Acceptance Process Details

Step 6: Onboarding

Once accepted, you'll receive a welcome packet. This includes details about uniforms, book lists, orientation dates, and other essentials to ensure a seamless transition to Kentwood Academy. New Student Onboarding

Embarking on a new educational journey is a pivotal moment. At Kentwood Academy, we're here to guide and support you every step of the way. We look forward to welcoming you to our family!

Staff Portal

Welcome to the Kentwood Academy Staff Portal. This is your central hub for accessing vital resources, tools, and communication channels to facilitate effective teaching and seamless administration.

School Email

Stay connected with fellow staff, administration, and students. Access your school email for important announcements, department communications, and academic updates.

My Concern

item.title: Junior Prep
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
Contents

  1. Our Philosophy
  2. A Day in Junior Prep
  3. Curriculum Highlights
  4. Outdoor Learning
  5. Arts and Culture
  6. Pastoral Care in Junior Prep
  7. Community Engagement
  8. Preparing for Senior Prep

Kentwood Academy's Junior Prep stands as a beacon of foundational learning, where our youngest scholars embark on an educational journey marked by curiosity, creativity, and compassion. Set against the serene backdrop of the UK countryside, the Junior Prep offers a nurturing environment where young minds flourish.

Our Philosophy

At the heart of our Junior Prep is the belief that every child is unique. We aim to foster a love for learning from these formative years, ensuring every student feels valued, heard, and inspired. Our curriculum is designed to be both challenging and enjoyable, laying strong academic and ethical foundations.

A Day in Junior Prep

A typical day in our Junior Prep is a delightful blend of academic sessions, playtime, creative classes, and nature exploration. Structured routines combined with free play ensure a balance of learning and relaxation, setting the rhythm for holistic growth.

Curriculum Highlights

Our dynamic curriculum encompasses core subjects such as Maths, English, and Science, infused with creative arts, languages, and physical education. Special emphasis is given to experiential learning, ensuring concepts are understood beyond the textbook.

Outdoor Learning

The sprawling Kentwood campus is a natural haven, and we make the most of it! Our outdoor learning sessions allow students to engage with nature, understand environmental science in action, and develop a deep appreciation for the world around them.

Arts and Culture

We believe in the power of creative expression. Our Junior Prep students have ample opportunities to delve into arts, music, drama, and dance. Regular showcases allow them to display their talents, boosting confidence and honing skills.

Pastoral Care in Junior Prep

The emotional and mental wellbeing of our youngest students is a top priority. Our dedicated pastoral team, along with class teachers, ensures a supportive environment where students can voice their feelings, navigate challenges, and thrive.

Community Engagement

Even at this young age, Kentwood instills the values of community service and empathy. Regular visits to local establishments, engagement with community members, and simple acts of kindness are integrated into the school experience.

Preparing for Senior Prep

As students approach the end of their Junior Prep journey, we ensure a seamless transition to Senior Prep. Orientation sessions, mentorship programs, and gradual introduction to advanced subjects make this shift smooth and exciting.

The Junior Prep at Kentwood Academy is more than just a stepping stone; it's where the foundation of lifelong learning and character-building begins. With a passionate team of educators and a vibrant community, our young scholars are set on a path of excellence and empathy. Discover More

item.title: Senior Prep
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
Contents

  1. Our Approach
  2. Academic Rigour
  3. Skills for the Future
  4. Extracurricular Excellence
  5. Leadership and Responsibility
  6. Career and University Guidance
  7. Pastoral Care and Wellbeing
  8. Engaging with the World
  9. Preparing for College

Nestled amidst the picturesque landscapes of the UK countryside, Kentwood Academy's Senior Prep is where young learners transition into confident, independent thinkers. This pivotal phase in a student's journey focuses on deep academic exploration, personal development, and the cultivation of leadership qualities.

Our Approach

The Senior Prep years are transformative. Recognizing this, our approach is tailored to address the unique needs of each student. We marry traditional learning with innovative teaching techniques, ensuring students are well-prepared for the challenges ahead.

Academic Rigour

Our comprehensive curriculum delves deeper into subjects, fostering analytical and critical thinking. While core subjects like Maths, English, and Science continue to be integral, students also get to explore advanced topics and specialise based on their interests.

Skills for the Future

Beyond traditional academics, we emphasize skills that are crucial for the future. Digital literacy, public speaking, research methodologies, and problem-solving exercises are integrated into the daily learning routine.

Extracurricular Excellence

Senior Prep students have a plethora of clubs, societies, and groups to choose from. Whether it's robotics, debate, music, or sports, there's something for everyone, ensuring a holistic educational experience.

Leadership and Responsibility

As they mature, students are given numerous opportunities to take on leadership roles – be it as house captains, student council members, or club leaders. Such positions cultivate responsibility, team management skills, and the ability to make impactful decisions.

Career and University Guidance

With the next academic phase on the horizon, our dedicated guidance counsellors assist students in making informed choices about their future. Regular career workshops, university visits, and alumni interactions provide insights into the world beyond Kentwood.

Pastoral Care and Wellbeing

The wellbeing of our students remains paramount. A dedicated team ensures that as the academic intensity increases, students have the support and resources they need to manage stress, understand their emotions, and maintain a positive mindset.

Engaging with the World

Field trips, exchange programs, and community service projects allow Senior Prep students to engage with the larger world. Such experiences broaden their horizons, teach them about diverse cultures, and instil a sense of global citizenship.

Preparing for College

As the culmination of their Senior Prep journey, students undergo rigorous preparation for college applications. Personal statement workshops, mock interviews, and entrance exam training ensure they put their best foot forward.

Kentwood Academy's Senior Prep is a sanctuary of growth, challenge, and inspiration. Here, students shape their identities, discover their passions, and set forth on paths destined for greatness. Discover More

item.title: Senior
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
Contents

  1. Advanced Academics
  2. A World of Opportunities
  3. The Arts and Beyond
  4. Sports and Physical Wellbeing
  5. Leadership and Personal Development
  6. University and Beyond
  7. Community and Service
  8. Personal Growth and Wellbeing
  9. Research and Innovation

Set against the tranquil backdrop of the UK's lush countryside, Kentwood Academy's Senior School stands as a beacon of advanced learning and personal evolution. As students transition into this final phase before university, they're met with robust academic programs, enriching extracurriculars, and an environment that nurtures their aspirations.

Advanced Academics

The curriculum in the Senior School is meticulously designed to provide students with a rich and diverse academic experience. It covers a broad range of subjects while allowing students to delve deep into their chosen specializations.

A World of Opportunities

Kentwood's Senior School is all about fostering independent thinkers and global citizens. Students are encouraged to participate in international exchange programs, global conferences, and internships, giving them a taste of the world beyond the classroom.

The Arts and Beyond

Our vibrant arts program offers students avenues to explore music, drama, and visual arts. The state-of-the-art facilities, coupled with passionate instructors, ensure that creativity flows freely through the corridors of Kentwood.

Sports and Physical Wellbeing

Physical development goes hand in hand with academic pursuits. Our expansive sports program ranges from traditional games like football and cricket to modern ones like aerobics and pilates, promoting both team spirit and individual prowess.

Leadership and Personal Development

At this stage, students are groomed to take on the world. With opportunities ranging from student council to leading community initiatives, they learn the essence of leadership, teamwork, and impactful decision-making.

University and Beyond

Our dedicated career and university counseling team ensures that students receive the guidance they need to make informed decisions about their future. From university application workshops to alumni mentoring, we provide all the necessary tools for their next big leap.

Community and Service

Service learning is integral to Kentwood's ethos. Senior students undertake community projects, both locally and internationally, instilling in them a sense of responsibility and a global perspective.

Personal Growth and Wellbeing

Mental and emotional wellbeing is prioritized, with counselors and mentors available for guidance. Workshops on stress management, emotional intelligence, and mindfulness are regular features.

Research and Innovation

Kentwood boasts of state-of-the-art labs and innovation hubs where students are encouraged to undertake research projects, bring their ideas to life, and even collaborate with experts in various fields.

At Kentwood Academy's Senior School, the focus is on creating well-rounded individuals ready to take on the world's challenges. We stand behind them as they stride confidently towards their future, celebrating each milestone and success.

item.title: Welcome from the Headteacher
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
At Kentwood Academy, education isn't just about academic achievement. It's a holistic journey that nurtures both the mind and the spirit. Nestled amidst verdant greenery, our sprawling campus is a haven of knowledge, buzzing with the vibrant energy of curious minds. Classrooms echo with spirited discussions, hallways reverberate with laughter, and every corner of the school is imbued with a sense of purpose and passion.

Our esteemed faculty is the backbone of Kentwood. With a rich tapestry of experiences and qualifications, they don't just teach; they inspire. Every lesson is a blend of traditional wisdom and contemporary insights, ensuring that our students are always at the forefront of innovation and excellence. Beyond the textbooks, our educators focus on life skills, from critical thinking to emotional intelligence, preparing our young scholars for the challenges of the ever-evolving world.

Extracurricular activities play a pivotal role in the Kentwood experience. The melodious strains of the school orchestra, the fierce debates of our literary club, and the strategic moves on the chessboard—each activity adds a unique dimension to our students' personalities. Sports, too, are an integral part of our ethos. Whether it's the swift glide of the swimmers or the strategic play of our basketball team, Kentwood champions the spirit of sportsmanship and teamwork.

In essence, Kentwood Academy isn't just a place of learning; it's a community. A community where every individual, whether student or staff, comes together in the shared pursuit of knowledge, growth, and a brighter future.

item.title: The Ethos and The Environment
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
Contents

  1. A Happy Learning Environment
  2. A Focus on Wellbeing
  3. Bespoke Support
  4. Making Life Easier for Busy Families
  5. Extra Curricular Vision
  6. A Strong Community
  7. Charity Fundraising

Kentwood Academy cherishes the belief that a conducive environment and strong ethos are vital in shaping well-rounded individuals, prepared not just academically, but emotionally and socially as well.

A Happy Learning Environment

At Kentwood, our classrooms radiate with joy, curiosity, and the excitement of discovery. We cultivate an atmosphere where every student feels safe to explore, question, and grow. Discover Our Teaching Methods

A Focus on Wellbeing

Well-being is at the heart of Kentwood's ethos. With mindfulness sessions, pastoral care, and a range of initiatives, we ensure our students are mentally and emotionally fortified. Learn About Our Wellbeing Initiatives

Bespoke Support

Recognizing each student's unique abilities and challenges, we offer dedicated support, crafting strategies to ensure every child thrives. Explore Our Support Services

Making Life Easier for Busy Families

We tailor our offerings to the dynamics of modern family life. From extended school hours to diverse after-school activities, we make school-life integration seamless. Learn About Our Extended Care

Extra Curricular Vision

Kentwood believes in nurturing talents beyond academics. Our vibrant arts, sports, and extracurricular scene ensures our students emerge as multifaceted individuals. Discover Our Clubs & Societies

A Strong Community

Our sense of community binds us together. From students and teachers to parents and alumni, Kentwood stands as a testament to unity, learning, and growth. Join Our Events & Gatherings

Charity Fundraising

Instilling a spirit of giving, our students actively engage in charitable activities, making a mark beyond our school's boundaries. Recent Fundraising Endeavors

Our overarching goal at Kentwood Academy is to foster an environment that contributes significantly to the holistic development of our students. Through our unwavering ethos and nurturing ambiance, we envision creating compassionate, responsible, and globally-aware citizens.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
Contents

  1. Data Collection:
  2. How We Use Your Data:
  3. Data Protection & Security:
  4. Sharing of Personal Data:
  5. Your Rights:
  6. Updates to Privacy Policy:
  7. Contact Us:

At Kentwood Academy, we place paramount importance on the privacy and security of our students, staff, and visitors. This privacy policy outlines how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you interact with us, both online and offline.

Data Collection:

When you interact with our services, such as when you visit our website, enroll your child, attend our events, or contact us for inquiries, we may collect the following types of information:

  • Personal identification details like your name, address, and contact details.
  • Specific academic and health details regarding students for educational and safety purposes.
  • Technical data such as IP address, browser type, and device information when you visit our website.

How We Use Your Data:

We utilize the data we collect for a variety of purposes:

Educational Needs:
To cater to the specific academic and extracurricular needs of our students.

Communication:
To inform you about upcoming events, announcements, or any changes in our institution.

Website Analysis:
To improve the user experience of our website based on visitor behavior and preferences.

Safety & Security:
To ensure the physical and emotional well-being of our students and staff.

Data Protection & Security:

We employ a variety of security measures to ensure the protection of your personal data:

  • Use of secure servers.
  • Periodic security reviews.
  • Restricted data access to authorized personnel only.

Sharing of Personal Data:

Kentwood Academy does not sell your personal information to third parties. However, we may share data with:

  • Educational partners or external institutions for specific academic purposes.
  • Regulatory or governmental bodies where legally required.

Your Rights:

You have the right to:

  • Request access to your personal data.
  • Request correction of any inaccurate personal data.
  • Opt-out of marketing communications.
  • Raise concerns or complaints regarding your data.

Updates to Privacy Policy:

This Privacy Policy may be updated periodically to reflect changes in our data practices. We will notify you of any significant changes and ensure our community is always aware of the information we collect and how it's used.

Contact Us:

If you have any questions or concerns regarding this policy or wish to exercise any of your rights mentioned above, please reach out to our data protection officer at example@kentwooddemo.wordpress.com.

We appreciate the trust you place in Kentwood Academy. Our commitment to your privacy and data protection remains unwavering.

item.title: Kentwood’s Library Transformation
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
We are elated to announce the grand reopening of Kentwood's cherished library, now masterfully refurbished to meet the ever-evolving needs of our dynamic student community.

At Kentwood, we understand that a library is more than just shelves of books—it’s a haven for imagination, a nexus of knowledge, and a sanctuary for seekers. Keeping pace with modern education trends and the growing synergy of technology with traditional literature, we were inspired to reimagine our library space.

The new design boasts ergonomic seating zones to promote collaborative learning and state-of-the-art tech nooks laden with the newest e-reading devices. Furthermore, our diversified collection now features an expanded array of titles, genres, and multimedia tools to elevate our students' academic journey.

But at its core, the heart of our library remains untouched. The essence of age-old tales resonates alongside the voices of contemporary authors, offering a balanced blend of the classic and the current.

This revamped space at Kentwood pays tribute to its storied past while embracing a forward-thinking vision. It stands as an emblem of our commitment to nurturing both reflective thought and collective discussion, fueling exploration and innovation.

We warmly invite our Kentwood family—students, alumni, and their loved ones—to experience this rejuvenated space firsthand. Let's embark on this renewed academic adventure together, enveloped by an environment crafted for the thinkers and dreamers of tomorrow.

item.title: Victory and Valour: Sports Day Spectacle
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
There are days in the school calendar that resonate with excitement, camaraderie, and spirit, and last week's Sports Day at Kentwood Academy was undoubtedly one of those sparkling occasions.

The skies over Kentwood were a perfect shade of blue as students, faculty, and families gathered at our sprawling sports complex, all eager to witness and partake in the athletic prowess on display. The energy in the air was palpable, punctuated by the rhythmic beats of the school band and the spirited cheers of onlookers.

As is tradition, the day kicked off with the torch relay. Captains from our senior year carried the flaming torch across the field, symbolising the burning passion and spirit of Kentwood sports. This was followed by a spectacular parade featuring all participating teams, flaunting their house colours with pride.

The events that unfolded were nothing short of thrilling. From sprints to relays, long jumps to high jumps, each student athlete gave their all, pushing boundaries and shattering personal bests. It wasn’t just about the speed or skill; it was the sheer determination, teamwork, and sportsmanship on display that truly captured hearts.

One of the day’s highlights was the tug-of-war challenge, which saw an intense battle of strength, strategy, and stamina. The synchronized chants of support from each house, combined with the grit of participants, made for an unforgettable spectacle.

But Sports Day at Kentwood is not just about the competition. It's a celebration of unity, spirit, and the values we hold dear: resilience, respect, and the joy of participation. The younger students took part in fun races, and there were numerous booths with games, refreshments, and entertainment, ensuring everyone, whether competing or cheering, had a memorable time.

As the day drew to a close and the sun began its descent, trophies were awarded to the triumphant and words of appreciation were shared for all. Every participant, irrespective of victory, left with something invaluable: memories of a day where they challenged themselves, supported their peers, and reveled in the collective spirit of Kentwood Academy.

A heartfelt thank you to the organisers, participants, and every member of the Kentwood community who made this day a resounding success. Here's to many more such moments of glory and camaraderie in the years to come!

item.title: Into the Wild: Year 9's Hiking Adventure
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
Every so often, it's essential to step out of the classroom and venture into the embrace of nature. And that’s exactly what our Year 9 students at Kentwood Academy did recently, embarking on an exhilarating hiking expedition that was as much a journey of self-discovery as it was a physical adventure.

The crisp morning air was filled with a mix of excitement and nervous anticipation as our students, equipped with backpacks and hiking boots, set out on their adventure. Guided by a few seasoned hikers from our faculty and some local experts, the trail chosen promised a blend of scenic beauty and a touch of challenge.

As the group traversed through dense woodlands, crossed babbling streams, and navigated rugged terrains, they were treated to nature's grandeur at its finest. Flora and fauna in their natural habitats enthralled the students, and many took the opportunity to snap photographs or jot down their observations - intertwining academic interests with this immersive experience.

What stood out, though, was the camaraderie. Steeper climbs saw students offering a hand or words of encouragement to their peers. Moments of rest were filled with laughter, shared snacks, and impromptu singing sessions. The journey highlighted the importance of teamwork, perseverance, and the value of enjoying the journey, not just the destination.

The pinnacle of the hike was reaching the summit. Standing atop, with the world spread out before them, the students experienced a mix of triumph, reflection, and awe. The panoramic view was a reminder of the vastness of the world beyond the school walls and the unlimited potential each student holds within.

The descent was equally significant, with students reflecting on their accomplishments, challenges faced, and lessons learned. By the time the group reached the base, the air was thick with tales of mini-adventures, new friendships forged, and personal barriers overcome.

As the day concluded, and the Year 9s returned to Kentwood, they brought back more than just tired legs and beautiful photographs. They carried with them cherished memories, a sense of accomplishment, and invaluable lessons about nature, teamwork, and themselves.

Here at Kentwood Academy, we firmly believe in the holistic development of our students. Adventures like these not only strengthen the body and mind but also nurture the soul. Kudos to Year 9 for taking this journey and setting an inspiring precedent for years to follow!

item.title: The Junior Prep Collaborative Adventure
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
In the vibrant corridors and classrooms of Kentwood Academy's Junior Prep School, learning often transcends textbooks. This month, our young scholars delved into an interactive "Working Together" activity, emphasizing the power and potential of collective effort.

The goal was simple yet profound: to instill in our students the value of teamwork, communication, and mutual respect. With this in mind, teachers crafted a series of challenges designed to be tackled not by individual prowess but by group synergy.

One particularly memorable task involved constructing bridges using only recycled materials. Students, split into teams, brainstormed, sketched, and debated various designs before settling on one. The catch? Each member was assigned a specific role - from materials manager to chief builder, and every role was pivotal to the bridge's success.

As the activity unfolded, it was heartwarming to see budding leaders take charge, mediators smooth over differences, and every student contributing in their unique way. Rooms buzzed with animated discussions, bursts of laughter, and the soft hum of concentration. The bridges slowly took shape, each reflecting its creators' ingenuity and collaborative spirit.

But the activity was more than just bridge-building. Through the process, students learned to listen actively, value diverse perspectives, and understand that every individual, regardless of their role, brings something unique to the table. They experienced firsthand that while individual brilliance is commendable, collective effort often leads to unmatched results.

By the activity's end, our Junior Prep classrooms were adorned with an array of innovative bridges, each telling a story of collaboration, creativity, and commitment. More importantly, our students walked away with invaluable lessons etched in their minds.

Reflecting on the day, Mrs. Thompson, one of our beloved Junior Prep teachers, remarked, "Activities like these lay the foundation for life skills. They teach our children not just to work, but to work together, making them better learners today and effective leaders tomorrow."

At Kentwood Academy, we believe that holistic education intertwines knowledge with experience. The "Working Together" activity is a testament to this belief, and we look forward to many more such enriching experiences for our young learners.

item.title: Cookie Policy
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
Contents

  1. What is a cookie?
  2. Why does Kentwood Academy use cookies?
  3. Types of cookies we use:
  4. Managing and Disabling Cookies:
  5. Updates & Contact:

At Kentwood Academy, we believe in being clear and open about how we collect and use data related to you. This policy provides detailed information about how and when we use cookies.

What is a cookie?

A cookie is a small file placed onto your device that enables Kentwood Academy website features and functionality. Any browser visiting our site may receive cookies from us or cookies from third parties such as our partners or service providers.

Why does Kentwood Academy use cookies?

We use cookies to ensure that we provide you with the best possible experience on our website. Cookies allow us to recognise your device and offer you tailored content. They also help us understand user behavior, which aids us in improving our website and offerings.

Types of cookies we use:

Essential Cookies:
These cookies are essential for the functionality of the Kentwood Academy website. Without these cookies, certain website features cannot function properly.

Performance and Analytics Cookies:
These cookies help us analyze how the website is used, monitor performance, and how users interact with our site. This allows us to improve and optimize our website.

Functionality Cookies:
These cookies allow our website to remember choices you've made in the past, like language preferences or login details.

Targeting and Advertising Cookies:
These cookies track browsing habits and are used to deliver targeted advertisements that are relevant to the individual user.

Managing and Disabling Cookies:

Most browsers automatically accept cookies, but you can choose whether or not to accept them. Your browser or device may offer settings that allow you to choose whether browser cookies are set and to delete them. You can manage your cookies through your web browser settings. Please note, if you choose to reject cookies, doing so may impair some of our website's functionality.

Updates & Contact:

We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page, so we encourage you to check back regularly. If you have questions about our Cookie Policy, please contact our data protection officer at example@kentwooddemo.wordpress.com.

Thank you for trusting Kentwood Academy. We remain committed to maintaining the privacy and protection of your personal data.

item.title: Policies
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
Contents

  1. Child Safeguarding:
  2. Anti-Bullying:
  3. Academic Integrity:
  4. Attendance:
  5. Equal Opportunities:
  6. Health & Safety:
  7. Technology & Internet Usage:

At Kentwood Academy, our commitment to fostering a safe, inclusive, and conducive learning environment extends to every facet of our institution. Our policies are crafted with the intent of upholding our academy's values while ensuring a clear framework of standards for our students, staff, and community. Below are the key policies we abide by:

Child Safeguarding:

Kentwood Academy prioritizes the safety and well-being of our students. Our child safeguarding policy outlines the measures, protocols, and procedures in place to ensure every student's protection, both on and off campus.

Child Safeguarding Policy

Anti-Bullying:

We uphold a zero-tolerance stance on bullying. Our anti-bullying policy elucidates on prevention measures, support for victims, and consequences for perpetrators.

Anti-Bullying Policy

Academic Integrity:

Integrity and honesty are central to our academic ethos. This policy provides a guideline on academic misconduct, including plagiarism, and the repercussions of any breach.

Academic Integrity Policy

Attendance:

Regular attendance is pivotal for academic success. Our attendance policy outlines the expectations, procedures for reporting absences, and the steps taken in the event of prolonged absenteeism.

Attendance Policy

Equal Opportunities:

Kentwood Academy is an inclusive community. Our equal opportunities policy ensures that all students, irrespective of their background, receive equal treatment and opportunities.

Equal Opportunities Policy

Health & Safety:

The well-being of our community is paramount. Our health and safety policy offers guidance on protocols, emergency procedures, and daily operations to ensure a safe learning environment.

Health & Safety Policy

Technology & Internet Usage:

In today's digital age, responsible use of technology is crucial. This policy sets the standard for acceptable usage of technology and the internet within our institution.

Technology & Internet Usage Policy

We continually review and update our policies to align with best practices and the evolving needs of our community. Your feedback and cooperation in upholding these standards are invaluable. Should you have queries or require further information on any policy, feel free to reach out to our administration office.

item.title: School Calendar
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
Contents

  1. Term Start and End Dates:
  2. Key Events:
    1. September:
    2. October:
    3. November:
    4. December:
  3. Examinations:

The school year at Kentwood Academy is filled with a multitude of academic, extracurricular, and community events that provide students with a well-rounded and enriching experience. Our calendar is designed to keep parents, students, and staff informed of all the upcoming activities, important academic dates, and holidays. Here's a glimpse into the key events and dates for the academic year:

Term Start and End Dates:

  • Autumn Term: Starts 6th September 2024 - Ends 16th December 2024
  • Spring Term: Starts 8th January 2025 - Ends 1st April 2025
  • Summer Term: Starts 20th April 2025 - Ends 30th June 2025

Term Dates Detailed Breakdown

Key Events:

September:

  • 6th: First Day of Autumn Term
  • 15th: Welcome Back Assembly
  • 27th: Parents-Teachers Meet

October:

  • 10th: Autumn Sports Day
  • 24th-28th: Half-term Holidays
  • 31st: Halloween Festivities

November:

  • 18th: Founders' Day Celebration
  • 28th: Winter Music Concert

December:

  • 12th: Christmas Bazaar
  • 16th: End of Term Assembly

Examinations:

  • Mock Exams for Year 11: 20th-24th February 2025
  • Final Exams for Seniors: 1st-15th June 2025

Examination Schedule & Details

Note: Due to unforeseen circumstances, there might be slight changes in the schedule. We recommend regularly checking this page for any updates. If you have any questions or need additional information regarding specific events, don't hesitate to get in touch with our school administration.

item.title: Boarding For All Ages
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
Contents

  1. Early Years Boarding
  2. Middle School Boarding
  3. Senior School Boarding
  4. Sixth Form and Pre-University Boarding

Kentwood Academy prides itself on offering a boarding experience tailored to every age group. Recognizing that students' needs and aspirations change as they grow, our boarding facilities and programs evolve to support them at every stage of their academic and personal journey.

Early Years Boarding

Nurturing Beginnings:
For our youngest boarders, the focus is on creating a nurturing environment that feels like a second home. With a higher staff-to-student ratio, young learners receive ample attention and care, ensuring they feel safe and cherished.

Structured Routine:
A consistent routine helps our youngest boarders adapt to boarding life, balancing academic pursuits with recreational activities that cater to their age and interests.

Middle School Boarding

Building Independence:
As students grow, they begin to seek greater independence. Our middle school boarding fosters this sense of autonomy while still providing a supportive framework.

Exploring Interests:
With a plethora of extracurricular activities tailored to this age group, middle school boarders are encouraged to explore new interests, be it in sports, arts, or other fields.

Senior School Boarding

Preparing for the Future:
Senior students are on the brink of university and adulthood. Our senior boarding program gears them up for this transition, emphasizing self-reliance, responsibility, and decision-making.

Academic Rigor:
With crucial exams and university applications on the horizon, the academic support for senior boarders intensifies. Dedicated study hours, tutoring sessions, and career counseling become central to their boarding experience.

Sixth Form and Pre-University Boarding

Tailored Guidance:
At this stage, students are making decisions that will shape their future. From university applications to career choices, the boarding staff offer specialized guidance to help them make informed decisions.

Life Skills:
Beyond academics, sixth form boarders are taught essential life skills – from budgeting and time management to cooking and laundry, ensuring they're well-prepared for university life and beyond.

At Kentwood Academy, boarding for all ages means understanding the unique requirements of each age group and offering a boarding experience that's tailored to meet those needs. As students transition from one stage to the next, the boarding environment evolves with them, ensuring they're always supported, challenged, and prepared for the future.

item.title: Weekly & Flexi Boarding
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
Contents

  1. Weekly Boarding
  2. Flexi Boarding

At Kentwood Academy, we understand that every family's needs are unique. With an aim to provide a versatile boarding experience that caters to various requirements, we offer both Weekly and Flexi Boarding options. Here's what each entails:

Weekly Boarding

An Extended School Experience:
Weekly boarders stay at the school from Monday to Friday, returning home for the weekends. This option provides students with the full boarding experience during the week while allowing them to spend quality time with their families over the weekend.

Benefits:

  • Immersion in the school’s academic and extracurricular activities.
  • Building strong relationships with peers in the boarding community.
  • Structured study periods to aid academic progress.
  • Reduced daily commute, providing more time for rest and recreation.

Facilities:
Weekly boarders enjoy access to all boarding house amenities, from study rooms and lounges to recreational areas, ensuring a comfortable and enriching stay.

Flexi Boarding

Adaptable to Your Needs:
Flexi boarding offers families the flexibility to choose which nights their child stays at the school. Ideal for parents with changing work schedules or students with specific school commitments.

Benefits:

  • Greater adaptability to fit around family commitments.
  • The opportunity for students to experience boarding life without the full-time commitment.
  • Ideal for easing transitions for students considering full-time boarding in the future.

Facilities:
Like their weekly counterparts, flexi boarders have full access to boarding house amenities. Dedicated staff ensure their experience is seamless, regardless of how often they board.

At Kentwood Academy, we believe in providing an inclusive and adaptable boarding environment. Whether you're looking for the continuity of weekly boarding or the flexibility of occasional stays, our boarding options are designed to cater to diverse needs, ensuring each student benefits from a supportive and engaging environment.

item.title: Full Boarding
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
Contents

  1. Immersive Community Experience
  2. Comprehensive Support System
  3. Modern Amenities

Kentwood Academy's full boarding option encapsulates the quintessential British boarding school experience. With a vibrant community, modern amenities, and a comprehensive support system, our full-time boarders immerse themselves in a nurturing environment that fosters growth, friendship, and holistic development.

Immersive Community Experience

Living and Learning Together:
Full boarders become an integral part of the Kentwood community, living on campus throughout the term. This continuous stay allows students to forge deep bonds, participate in weekend activities, and make the most of everything the school has to offer.

Benefits:

  • A close-knit community that facilitates the formation of lifelong friendships.
  • Extended opportunities for academic enrichment, personal development, and extracurricular involvement.
  • A safe and supervised environment, overseen by experienced house parents and staff.

Comprehensive Support System

Holistic Care:
Our dedicated boarding team ensures that every student's well-being is prioritised. From academic guidance to emotional support, our staff members are trained to assist students in all aspects of their lives.

Benefits:

  • Regular check-ins and mentoring sessions to monitor academic progress and personal growth.
  • Access to counselling and support services.
  • Dedicated medical facilities and staff for health and wellness needs.

Modern Amenities

Home Away from Home:
Kentwood's boarding houses are equipped with modern facilities designed to make students' stays comfortable and enjoyable. From cozy bedrooms and common areas to study rooms and recreational spaces, every detail is tailored to provide a home-like ambiance.

Benefits:

  • Spacious rooms that cater to individual and shared accommodations.
  • Recreational areas, including games rooms, lounges, and outdoor spaces for relaxation.
  • Dedicated study areas for focused academic work.

Kentwood Academy's full-boarding option provides students with an enriching experience that extends beyond academics. It’s a journey of self-discovery, camaraderie, and personal growth. As they navigate the challenges and joys of boarding life, our students emerge as confident, compassionate, and capable individuals, ready to take on the world.

item.title: Boarding Houses
item.dc:creator: themedemos
item.content:encoded:
Contents

  1. Leeds House
  2. St Gabriel's House
  3. St Michael’s House
  4. St Dunstan's House

Kentwood Academy boasts a range of boarding houses, each with its distinct personality, history, and ethos. These houses are more than just places to stay; they are communities where friendships are forged, memories are created, and personal growth is nurtured. Here's a closer look at each of our prestigious houses:

Leeds House

Home Away From Home:
Leeds House is known for its warm and welcoming atmosphere. This house prides itself on creating a familial setting where every student feels valued and at home.

Facilities:
Modern bedrooms, a state-of-the-art common room, and dedicated study spaces ensure that Leeds House boarders have everything they need for a comfortable and productive stay.

Traditions:
From the annual Leeds House Feast to its participation in inter-house competitions, Leeds House has rich traditions that its boarders cherish and uphold.

St Gabriel's House

Emphasis on Individual Growth:
St Gabriel's House fosters an environment that encourages self-exploration, personal growth, and academic achievement.

Facilities:
With landscaped gardens, a spacious lounge, and a library, St Gabriel's offers a blend of relaxation and study spaces.

Community:
Strong bonds of friendship are a hallmark of St Gabriel's House, with students often forming connections that last a lifetime.

St Michael’s House

Legacy of Excellence:
St Michael’s House has a storied history of academic and extracurricular excellence, inspiring its boarders to aim high and achieve their potential.

Facilities:
Equipped with modern amenities, including a music room and a tech hub, St Michael’s House offers a balanced boarding experience.

Camaraderie:
Team spirit is strong in St Michael’s, with the house often leading the charge in school-wide events and competitions.

St Dunstan's House

Nurturing Creativity:
St Dunstan's House has always been a hub for the creatively inclined, nurturing talents in arts, music, and drama.

Facilities:
Beyond the standard amenities, St Dunstan's boasts an art studio and a performance space, allowing its boarders to pursue their passions.

Heritage:
St Dunstan's House carries forward a rich legacy, celebrating its history while continuously evolving to meet the needs of its modern boarders.

At Kentwood Academy, each boarding house offers a unique experience, shaped by its history, traditions, and the vibrant community of students that call it home. Whether it's the familial warmth of Leeds, the emphasis on personal growth at St Gabriel's, the legacy of excellence at St Michael’s, or the creative hub that is St Dunstan's, there's a place for every student in our boarding community.
